snapshot.title: Add missing briefingExpression to all chapters
snapshot.description: Several chapters in lib/storylines.ts have no briefingExpression set, so the avatar defaults to 'neutral' for every briefing. Each chapter should have an intentional expression. Related: @doc/specs/characters-storylines
